title: StageManifest
description: Ordivon Control Plane — desired state for a governance stage. Defines what a stage SHOULD produce, what boundaries it must respect, what verification it must pass, and what predicates constitute closure.

stage_id.description: Unique stage identifier. Format: <area>-<descriptor> e.g. DOC-GOV-1, CHK-MATURITY-2

risk_class.description: Risk classification. AP-R0 = advisory/documentation only. AP-R3 = runtime/external action.

authority_impact.description: Authority impact level. AI-0 = current_truth only. AI-3 = policy/publish/release.

task_type.description: Semantic type: documentation_governance, checker_development, schema_change, runtime_evidence, external_benchmark, etc.

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns for paths this stage is permitted to modify.

forbidden_paths.description: Glob patterns for paths this stage must NEVER modify.

forbidden_actions.description: Semantic actions that are prohibited: network_calls, live_api_calls, package_release, external_auth, policy_promotion_without_human_approval, broker_write, etc.

required_evidence.description: Evidence types that must be produced: git_diff, command_output, checker_result, file_change_list, registry_diff

required_receipt_fields.description: Fields that must be present in the receipt for it to be valid.

id.description: Predicate identifier: all_required_docs_registered, receipt_valid, no_authority_escalation, etc.

check.description: How this predicate is verified: registry_scan, receipt_schema_validation, boundary_check, git_diff_scan, etc.
